citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Accountability in AI systems means designers and decision makers take responsibility for the system's actions. Respect for privacy means the system does not act in ways that violate people's privacy rights.
